[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000110010 4
1 0110101100 5
2 1100111011 7
3 1100110001 5
4 1000110010 4
5 1100011110 6
6 0100001001 3
7 1010011011 6

01 10 1000110010 4 match 0 4
12 21 0000100010 2
23 32 0010100000 2
34 43 1000000100 2
45 54 0100001000 2
56 65 0000001001 2
67 76 0010010011 4
70 07 0010010010 3

02 20 0010100010 3
13 31 1000100000 2
24 42 0100001010 3
35 53 0000000001 1
46 64 1000011010 4
57 75 0000000001 1
60 06 1010010010 4
71 17 0000010010 2

14 41 1000010010 3
25 52 0100001000 2
36 63 1010000001 3
47 74 0000010110 3
50 05 0000000000 a
61 16 1000010010 3
72 27 0010000010 2

15 51 0000000000 a
26 62 0010001010 3
37 73 0011000101 4
